title: (2-PACK) Gear Aid Seam Grip Waterproof Rip and Tear Gear Repair
description:
Seam Grip by Gear Aid is a gear repair kit in a tube. Use it as a tent seam sealer, sleeping pad fixer or equipment re-builder. Works on all types of fabrics and surfaces, including neoprene, PVC, rubber, leather, vinyl and synthetics. Seam Grip goes beyond patching holes. It waterproofs tent seams, improves traction and offers abrasion resistance, too. So take a tube of Seam Grip wherever you go, because you never know when gear will rip, leak or fall apart. Save your gear-and your adventure-with the award-winning Seam Grip. 2 Pack

(2-PACK) Gear Aid Seam Grip Waterproof Rip and Tear Gear Repair

Seam Grip by Gear Aid is a gear repair kit in a tube. Use it as a tent seam sealer, sleeping pad fixer or equipment re-builder. Works on all types of fabrics and surfaces, including neoprene, PVC, rubber, leather, vinyl and synthetics.

Key Features

  • Seam Grip by Gear Aid Patches Holes, Repairs Rips. Waterproof Seam Sealer - 2 Pack
  • Fix all kinds of gear with Gear Aid's Seam Grip.
  • Urethane based seam sealer and repair adhesive.
  • Editors Choice Gold Award from Backpacker Magazine. Flexible, waterproof formula is unaffected by extreme cold or heat.
  • Safe for use on natural and synthetic fabrics. Excellent adhesion and abrasion resistance. Made in USA.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: SG_SS1-2
  • UPC: 830987389320
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: 1 oz

Seam Grip goes beyond patching holes. It waterproofs tent seams, improves traction and offers abrasion resistance, too.

So take a tube of Seam Grip wherever you go, because you never know when gear will rip, leak or fall apart. Save your gear-and your adventure-with the award-winning Seam Grip.

2 Pack
